creator: rscheff@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Peter Holm from comment #9)

Looking at that console output from tcpdump, it seems that it's too much delayed between what is happening and until tcpdump comes around to pretty-print this; If the patch I provided doesn't help, I probably want to look at the full core file while tcpdump was also running, to get the history of all the packets being processed (and which tcp session is the offending one).
